creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
Just do something like dd if=/dev/zero
of=/path/to/additional/swap/file bs=1M count=<your needs> && swapon
/dev/`mdconfig -a -t vnode -f /path/to/additional/swap/file`
When you're done, use swapoff, mdconfig -d -u <number>. After that you
can safely delete swap file.
